core_mechanism: an order-by-order asymptotic perturbative expansion in a small coupling parameter whose dominant large-logarithmic terms near a phase-space boundary are collected and resummed to all orders into a closed form factor
brief_reason: The abstract builds fixed-order perturbative calculations up to four loops in which large logarithms appear and are then resummed to all orders into form factors, which is the generic small-parameter expansion-plus-leading-log-resummation machinery.
